# Layout Inventory

This directory contains Metronic layout variants kept as reference/template inventory.

## Important

- These layouts are **not** the active NR-1 School app shell.
- The active shell lives in `src/layouts`.
- Do not place normal product work here unless there is an explicit migration decision.

## Use This Directory For

- visual reference
- copying isolated interaction patterns on purpose
- future layout migration work with clear scope

## Do Not Use This Directory For

- day-to-day feature delivery
- page-specific business flows
- routing decisions for the main app
